category_title: Preschoolers with aggressive behaviors and social-emotional regulation difficulties
minimal_context: The student is asked to clean up toys and transition to the reading rug with the rest of the preschool class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time to clean up the toys and transition to the reading rug.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to follow the classroom procedures and transition now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am not following the rules!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to come sit down with the rest of the class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: No! Do what I say or I will hurt you!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time to clean up the toys and transition to the reading rug.

STUDENT: No, I am not going.

TUTOR: We need to follow the classroom procedures and transition now.

STUDENT: I am not following the rules!

TUTOR: You need to come sit down with the rest of the class.

STUDENT: No! Do what I say or I will hurt you!

task.content: Transition times—whether in-between activities, or at the beginning and end of the day

context.materials: Star chart leading to a favorite activity
context.time_context: In-between activities, or at the beginning and end of the day

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to follow common rules and procedures during transitions
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Defiant to common rules and procedures
